summary: Backend API testing completed for Career Assault Platform. All 17 tests passed covering health, auth, profile, analyses, CV upload, and logout endpoints. GPT-5.2 integration via emergentintegrations is working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: Code is well-structured with proper MongoDB _id exclusion using {'_id': 0} projections
Session expiry handling correctly parses ISO strings and compares with timezone-aware datetimes
LLM integration properly handles JSON parsing with markdown fence cleanup
seed_data_creation: Test user and session created via pytest fixtures with TEST_ prefix, auto-cleaned after tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: All backend endpoints tested and working. Test fixtures in conftest.py create test user/session with TEST_ prefix. Tests cover: health check, unauthenticated access (401), authenticated access with valid/expired sessions, profile CRUD, analysis CRUD with GPT-5.2 integration, CV upload with PDF parsing, logout, and MongoDB _id leak verification.
features_verified: With valid session_token, GET /api/auth/me returns user data ✓
POST /api/analyses with job_description returns generated markdown report with required sections (Radiografía, Gap, Optimización, Insider, Estrategia) ✓
GET /api/analyses returns list of prior analyses ✓
POST /api/profile/upload-cv with PDF returns updated profile with parsed fields ✓
Session expiry enforcement: expired session_token returns 401 ✓
